import { Command, CommandContext, CommandHandler } from '../types';
import { commands } from './index';

export const commandHandler: CommandHandler = {
  async handle(context: CommandContext): Promise<void> {
    const { message } = context;
    const text = message.text || '';
    const parts = text.split(' ');
    const commandName = parts[0].toLowerCase();

    const command: Command | undefined = commands.find(
      (cmd) => cmd.name === commandName
    );

    if (!command) {
      return;
    }

    try {
      await command.execute(context);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(`Error executing command ${commandName}:`, error);
      await context.bot.sendMessage(
        message.chat.id,
        'Произошла ошибка при выполнении команды.'
      );
    }
  },
};

import { Command } from 'commander';
import { execSync } from 'child_process';
import { resolve } from 'path';
import { existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'fs';
import { cyan, green, red } from 'kolorist';
import { input, select } from '@clack/prompts';
import { getPackageManager } from '../utils/getPackageManager';
import { getProjectInfo } from '../utils/getProjectInfo';

import { getTailwindVersion } from '../utils/getTailwindVersion';

import { getTailwindCssFileV4 } from '../utils/getTailwindCssFileV4';

export const createCommand = new Command('create')
  .description('create a new shadcn-ui project')
  .option('-y, --yes', 'skip prompts and use defaults')
  .option('-p, --path <path>', 'path to the project')
  .option('-t, --type <type>', 'project type (react, vue, svelte, etc.)')
  .option('-f, --force', 'force overwrite of existing files')
  .action(async (options) => {
    try {
      const cwd = process.cwd();
      const projectPath = options.path ? resolve(cwd, options.path) : cwd;

      // Check if project already exists
      if (
        existsSync(resolve(projectPath, 'package.json')) &&
        !options.force
      ) {
        console.log(
          red(
            'A project already exists in this directory. Use --force to overwrite.'
          )
        );
        return;
      }

      // Get project type
      let projectType = options.type;
      if (!projectType) {
        projectType = await select({
          message: 'Select project type',
          options: [
            { value: 'react', label: 'React' },
            { value: 'vue', label: 'Vue' },
            { value: 'svelte', label: 'Svelte' },
            { value: 'solid', label: 'Solid' },
            { value: 'next', label: 'Next.js' },
            { value: 'nuxt', label: 'Nuxt' },
          ],
        });
      }

      // Initialize project based on type
      const packageManager = getPackageManager();
      const projectInfo = getProjectInfo(projectType);

      console.log(cyan(`\nInitializing ${projectType} project...`));
      execSync(`${packageManager} create ${projectInfo.template} ${projectPath}`, {
        stdio: 'inherit',
      });

      // Install dependencies
      console.log(cyan('\nInstalling dependencies...'));
      execSync(`${packageManager} install`, {
        cwd: projectPath,
        stdio: 'inherit',
      });

      // Install Tailwind CSS
      console.log(cyan('\nInstalling Tailwind CSS...'));
      execSync(`${packageManager} add -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer`, {
        cwd: projectPath,
        stdio: 'inherit',
      });

      // Initialize Tailwind
      console.log(cyan('\nInitializing Tailwind CSS...'));
      execSync(`${packageManager} exec tailwindcss init -p`, {
        cwd: projectPath,
        stdio: 'inherit
